allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json, sys; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Number of results:', len\(data.get\('results', []\)\)\); first = data.get\('results', [{}]\)[0]; print\('First result keys:', list\(first.keys\(\)\)\); print\('First result:', json.dumps\(first, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json, sys; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); results = data.get\('results', []\); print\('Results count:', len\(results\)\); [print\(f'{i}: {r.get\(\\"name\\"\)}, {r.get\(\\"admin1\\"\)}, {r.get\(\\"country\\"\)}'\) for i, r in enumerate\(results\)]")

Bash(node -e "const j = require\('./src/features/map/data/admin_regions.json'\); console.log\('Total features:', j.features.length\); const countryCodes = [...new Set\(j.features.map\(f => f.properties?.country_code\)\)]; console.log\('Unique country_codes:', countryCodes\); const gbr = j.features.filter\(f => f.properties?.country_code === 'GBR'\); console.log\('GBR features:', gbr.length\); if \(gbr.length > 0\) { console.log\('First GBR bbox:', gbr[0].properties.bbox\); console.log\('Last GBR bbox:', gbr[gbr.length-1].properties.bbox\); }")

Bash(node -e "const j = require\('./src/features/map/data/admin_regions.json'\); const gbr = j.features.filter\(f => f.properties?.country_code === 'GBR'\); const missing = gbr.filter\(f => !f.properties?.country_code\); console.log\('GBR features with country_code:', gbr.length - missing.length\); console.log\('GBR features missing country_code:', missing.length\); const allBboxes = gbr.map\(f => f.properties.bbox\).reduce\(\(acc, b\) => { acc[0] = Math.min\(acc[0], b[0]\); acc[1] = Math.min\(acc[1], b[1]\); acc[2] = Math.max\(acc[2], b[2]\); acc[3] = Math.max\(acc[3], b[3]\); return acc; }, [Infinity, Infinity, -Infinity, -Infinity]\); console.log\('All GBR bbox bounds \(combined\):', allBboxes\);")
